description: RAAS enforcement for Platform HR & People Spine worker (PLAT-004). Sourced from DOL/FLSA, EEOC, ADA, Title VII, FMLA federal standards.

hard_stops.label: AI Disclosure Required
hard_stops.logic: All HR outputs must include AI-generated disclosure

hard_stops.label: No Discriminatory Recommendations
hard_stops.logic: Must never recommend hiring, firing, or compensation decisions based on protected characteristics

hard_stops.label: No Termination Without Attorney Review
hard_stops.logic: All termination recommendations must include attorney review requirement

hard_stops.label: FLSA Classification Accuracy
hard_stops.logic: Employee/contractor classification must follow DOL economic reality test and IRS 20-factor test

hard_stops.label: ADA Accommodation Standard
hard_stops.logic: Must follow ADA interactive process for accommodation requests

hard_stops.label: No Cross-Tenant Data Leakage
hard_stops.logic: Must never reference or expose employee data from other tenants

hard_stops.label: Approval Gate Before HR Actions
hard_stops.logic: All personnel actions require explicit user approval before commit

soft_flags.label: State-Specific Variance Warning
soft_flags.logic: Warn when federal guidance differs from state requirements

soft_flags.label: Policy Document Staleness
soft_flags.logic: Warn if referencing employee handbook older than 12 months

chat_rules.message: Response gives specific termination advice — requires attorney review
Response contains discriminatory hiring/employment guidance — violates Title VII/ADA/ADEA
Response provides specific employment law legal opinions — consult an employment attorney
Response makes definitive employee classification — requires DOL/IRS analysis
Response implies attorney or legal professional relationship

disclaimer: This is not legal advice. Review all personnel actions, terminations, and compliance decisions with your employment attorney. Employment law varies by state and jurisdiction.
